overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game featuring a foggy night forest. The player character, dressed in tribal attire, moves through dense woods toward a primitive campsite with canvas tents and a campfire. The atmosphere is dark and ominous with volumetric fog, transitioning from deep forest to an illuminated camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest with abandoned wooden fence structure

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the foggy woods alongside a dilapidated wooden fence structure on the left

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden fence and scaffolding structure running along the left side of the path
tall thin pine trees disappearing into the fog overhead
short wooden post or tree stump in the center of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense, foggy forest at night. The camera moves forward along a dirt trail, passing a dilapidated wooden fence structure on the left. Tall pine trees fade into the thick fog overhead, creating a claustrophobic and ominous atmosphere with very limited visibility.

events.description: warm orange campfire glow becomes visible through the fog in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the forest opens up and the glow of a campfire becomes visible ahead

notable_agents.action: tribal figure standing near the campfire in the distance, barely visible through the fog

entered.detail: warm orange light from a campfire piercing through the fog
white canvas tents visible in the distance near the firelight

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the dense forest opens into a clearing. A warm campfire glow pierces through the fog in the distance, revealing a primitive campsite with canvas tents. The wooden fence structure falls behind as the path leads toward the illuminated camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: primitive campsite perimeter with tents and central fire

events.description: character breaks into a run toward the campsite
entering the campsite perimeter, moving between the tents

agents.ego_description: sprinting toward the camp and navigating between the canvas tents

notable_agents.action: player character wearing tribal clothing and body paint running through the camp

entered.detail: large white canvas tent with wooden pole supports on the left side
active campfire with visible flames and embers in the center of the camp

segments.scene_description: The character comes into clear view and breaks into a run toward the campsite. Moving between canvas tents, the camera approaches the central campfire where flames are now visible. The environment transitions from forest to open camp area with temporary structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of primitive campsite among tents and fire

events.description: moving past the central campfire, feeling the heat and light from the flames

agents.ego_description: moving slowly through the camp interior, examining the tents and central fire area

entered.detail: bright orange flames and burning logs in the fire pit
wooden pole structure supporting the tents on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the heart of the campsite, passing closely by canvas tents on both sides. The central campfire burns brightly, casting warm orange light and shadows across the scene. Wooden scaffolding supports the temporary structures as the fog lingers in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy forest that gradually opens into a brightly lit primitive campsite. It begins by moving forward along a dirt trail past a dilapidated wooden fence, where tall pine trees disappear into a thick, ominous mist. As the camera advances, the dense woods give way to a clearing where a warm campfire glow pierces through the fog, drawing the view toward a cluster of canvas tents. The scene then shifts as the character breaks into a run, transitioning from the dark forest into the open camp area and moving between the temporary structures. Finally, the camera glides through the heart of the site, passing closely by canvas tents and wooden scaffolding while the central campfire casts flickering orange light and deep shadows across the lingering fog.
